html:
Exclusive to:

KingGateGuards

The Sanctum Statues can be found within the Sanctum. The King statue in the King Statue Room, the Gate, Bugs and Ancients statues in the Gate Statue Room and the Guards statues in the Guard Statues Room.

Gallery

  • King Statue
  • Gate Statues
  • Guards Statues
  • Guards Statues with Waymark that is under construction.
  • Sanctum Concept Art from Rhymes with Play stream.
  • King Statue Concept Art from Rhymes with Play stream.
  • Guardians Statues Concept Art from Rhymes with Play stream.

Miscellaneous
"vault_statue"
Exclusive to:
KingGateGuards
“Looks like he met a dark end...”
–Wilson, examining the King statue.
“What is that goop?”
–Willow, examining the King statue.
“Is very tragic.”
–Wolfgang, examining the King statue.
“He gave in.”
–Wendy, examining the King statue.
“INTEGRITY CHECK FAILED. CORRUPTION DETECTED”
–WX-78, examining the King statue.
“It appears the ancient king has forfeited his very essence to the darkness.”
–Wickerbottom, examining the King statue.
“Oh geez, he's rotten to the core.”
–Woodie, examining the King statue.
“I have complicated feelings about this.”
–Maxwell, examining the King statue.
“It döth seem Lörd Insect hath struck a fell bargain.”
–Wigfrid, examining the King statue.
“He's not okay.”
–Webber, examining the King statue.
“Oh my, he's rotting.”
–Warly, examining the King statue.
“Dark inside Bug King”
–Wormwood, examining the King statue.
“It's like he sprung some sorta demonic oil leak.”
–Winona, examining the King statue.
“The Monarch is lost to the Dark!”
–Wortox, examining the King statue.
“Bugfolk King sick? Glurgh.”
–Wurt, examining the King statue.
“Poor fella doesn't look well, eh Woby?”
–Walter, examining the King statue.
“I don't think he foresaw this.”
–Wanda, examining the King statue.
“This really bugs me.”
–Wilson, examining the Gate and its surrounding corpses.
“That's a lot of dead bugs.”
–Willow, examining the Gate and its surrounding corpses.
“Is just bugs. Why Wolfgang heart breaking?”
–Wolfgang, examining the Gate and its surrounding corpses.
“So much death.”
–Wendy, examining the Gate and its surrounding corpses.
“HA... HA?”
–WX-78, examining the Gate and its surrounding corpses.
“A depiction of an extinction-level event.”
–Wickerbottom, examining the Gate and its surrounding corpses.
“Someone... or something did a number on them.”
–Woodie, examining the Gate and its surrounding corpses.
“This was before my time.”
–Maxwell, examining the Gate and its surrounding corpses.
“What vile förce cöuld claim sö many söuls?”
–Wigfrid, examining the Gate and its surrounding corpses.
“Oh no...”
–Webber, examining the Gate and its surrounding corpses.
“The end of the bugs?”
–Warly, examining the Gate and its surrounding corpses.
“Not sleeping”
–Wormwood, examining the Gate and its surrounding corpses.
“Someone used up the whole can of bug spray.”
–Winona, examining the Gate and its surrounding corpses.
“Mass extinction makes no distinction!”
–Wortox, examining the Gate and its surrounding corpses.
“Bugfolk all gone.”
–Wurt, examining the Gate and its surrounding corpses.
“Something real bad happened to them.”
–Walter, examining the Gate and its surrounding corpses.
“This is how it ended for them.”
–Wanda, examining the Gate and its surrounding corpses.
“They make a pointed argument.”
–Wilson, examining the Guard statues.
“Watch where you're pointing those!”
–Willow, examining the Guard statues.
“Lucky they are statue, or Wolfgang squish them all!”
–Wolfgang, examining the Guard statues.
“We aren't meant to leave this place.”
–Wendy, examining the Guard statues.
“YOU DARE TAKE UP ARMS AGAINST A SUPERIOR BEING?”
–WX-78, examining the Guard statues.
“These must be the soldier caste of the ancient insect society.”
–Wickerbottom, examining the Guard statues.
“Great. Giant armed termites.”
–Woodie, examining the Guard statues.
“Ooh. So menacing.”
–Maxwell, examining the Guard statues.
“I döth dare these stöne warriörs tö röuse fröm slumber and cröss blades with me!”
–Wigfrid, examining the Guard statues.
“They look mean!”
–Webber, examining the Guard statues.
“I am relieved they are only statues.”
–Warly, examining the Guard statues.
“Hi, friends! Why mad?”
–Wormwood, examining the Guard statues.
“They sure don't want nobody leavin'.”
–Winona, examining the Guard statues.
“Oh dears. They appears to have spears, I fears!”
–Wortox, examining the Guard statues.
“Brave Bugfolk.”
–Wurt, examining the Guard statues.
“They're just statues, girl!”
–Walter, examining the Guard statues.
“They've stood guard for a long time.”
–Wanda, examining the Guard statues.
The Sanctum Statues can be found within the Sanctum. The King statue in the King Statue Room, the Gate, Bugs and Ancients statues in the Gate Statue Room and the Guards statues in the Guard Statues Room.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Các Tượng Thánh Điện có thể được tìm thấy trong Thánh Điện. Tượng Vua trong Phòng Tượng Vua, các tượng Cổng, Bọ và Người xưa trong Phòng Tượng Cổng và tượng Vệ binh trong Phòng Tượng Vệ binh.
